# airtelcloud_storage_access_key (Resource)

Manages an Airtel Cloud object storage access key for S3-compatible programmatic access.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `expiry` (Number) Duration in seconds for key validity (e.g., 2592000 for 30 days). Converted to a Unix timestamp at creation time.

### Read-Only

- `access_key` (String, Sensitive) The S3 access key.
- `access_key_id` (String) The access key identifier used for management operations.
- `create_time` (Number) Unix timestamp of when the access key was created.
- `expiry_timestamp` (Number) The Unix timestamp when the access key expires.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the access key.
- `secret_key` (String, Sensitive) The S3 secret key. Only fully available after creation.
- `url` (String) The S3 endpoint URL.
